_comment: dialogue_veyrashollow.json: This table is used for the npc chat in Veyra's Hollow.

dialogue.greeting: Welcome to the Hollow. Speak softly—shadows have ears.
dialogue.help: There are whispers of movement in the marsh. We need someone discreet.
dialogue.lore: Veyra’s Hollow was once a druidic grove, now twisted by secrets and fog.

dialogue.greeting: You’ve got the look of someone who knows how to vanish.
dialogue.help: We’ve a job—quiet, quick, and no questions asked.
dialogue.lore: The Accord doesn’t seek power. We seek control of the unseen.
dialogue.farewell: If you’re caught, you never met me.

dialogue.greeting: The mind is a maze. I can show you the shortcuts.
dialogue.help: There’s a rift forming in the dreamveil. We need a mindwalker.
dialogue.lore: The Guild of the Eclipsed Mind believes reality is merely suggestion.
dialogue.farewell: Sleep with one eye open—and the other dreaming.
